text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! How do you do it, Jordan? Your nails always
look so cute!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's such a stylish design! Even just painting
them looks difficult. You're a real pro, Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you guys are into nail art? Hm... In that
case, we can paint yours together if you want.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
If I have super striking stylish nails, I bet people
will notice me! Can you make that happen?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Sounds easy enough. So, like, got any specific
vibes or motifs in mind?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm... I can only think of boring stuff!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
How about you base it on something special to
you then?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If it was me, I'd get my mom's face on one nail,
and Suzuka's face on another... And everyone else
on my other nails!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Not gonna lie, that's a bit sus.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Okay. Then I'd like my nails to be like, pow in
the middle and glitzy around the edges! Like
mu-mu-mun!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Um... Why don't we stick to just one color for
now, 'kay?
